question: Using the referenced source exhibit, what is wrong with this JSON file? { "interface": "Fa0/1", "bandwidth": "100mb", "status": "up", "address": { "ipaddress": "192.168.1.5", "subnetmask": "255.255.255.0", "default gateway": "192.168.1.1", }
